core_equation_or_likelihood: z_i = eta(g_i)+eps_i; A_inferred=0 if z<=0, A_inferred=1 if z>=1, else A=z
why_it_may_improve_rho: A_inferred has 12 zeros and 57 ones, so treating endpoints as exact values distorts rank; latent z may recover ordering
overfit_control: 5-fold CV; global parameters; compare pairwise rank likelihood
primary_gate: out-of-fold Spearman > 0.60 and RMSE below M19

new_variable_candidates: angular momentum proxy in pi0/pi1 and mu
why_it_may_improve_rho: Separates endpoint class probability from interior response; fits bounded distributions better than MSE
overfit_control: limited logistic submodels; no per-galaxy terms; AIC/BIC + CV
primary_gate: out-of-fold Spearman > 0.60 and calibrated endpoint frequencies

core_equation_or_likelihood: dA/dtau = F(A,g,j); optimize pairwise logistic loss over sign(A_i-A_k)
why_it_may_improve_rho: Directly optimizes rank ordering rather than pointwise MSE; can lift rho if current equation gets order wrong
overfit_control: pairwise train loss but held-out galaxy predictions; permutation null

new_variable_candidates: J=lambda proxy or standardized log j
why_it_may_improve_rho: Sparse discovery can identify missing interaction terms without broad black-box fitting
overfit_control: predeclared library; L0/L1 term cap <=4; nested CV
primary_gate: OOF rho > 0.60 and stable selected terms in >=4/5 folds

core_equation_or_likelihood: A=calibrate_monotone(s(g,j)); s=sum f_k(x_k) with sign/shape constraints
new_variable_candidates: monotone spin/size variable; dyn; RHI suppressor
why_it_may_improve_rho: Can capture nonlinear but monotone thresholds in small N while preserving interpretability
overfit_control: few knots; monotone constraints; bootstrap stability
primary_gate: OOF rho > 0.60 and monotonicity diagnostics pass

core_equation_or_likelihood: V_pred^4 = G M_b a0 Q_eff(A_latent,g,j)^2; likelihood in log Vflat
why_it_may_improve_rho: Avoids clipped A target entirely; evaluates physical observable with uncertainty
overfit_control: uncertainty-weighted likelihood; frozen global parameters; compare BTFR residuals
primary_gate: improved held-out logV likelihood and induced activation rho > 0.60
